author: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil
keyChange: ASI moved from 666 to 555. 555 = MEMORY stage. Superintelligence emerges from deep pattern recognition across accumulated evidence — institutional knowledge crystallizes into wisdom at the MEMORY layer. Hermes polymorphic model formalized (one runtime, N role bindings via skills/cards). Principal Agent Taxonomy ratified (principal_agent + binding fields for F11 auditability, A2A routing clarity, and honest capability surfacing across 18 citizens).

PRIMARY.description: Federation agents — DO the work. Externally addressable via A2A.

SUPPORT.description: Internal control-plane agents — WATCH and RECORD. Not directly user-facing.

CODING.description: Coding agents — EDIT and EXECUTE. Heterogeneous CLIs unified under one capability fabric.
CODING.note: All CODING agents share the same 97-tool capability index and F1-F13 governance, regardless of native MCP support.

RUNTIME.description: Live service agents with active systemd services and Telegram presence. These are the operational incarnations of the HEXAGON + CODING tiers.
RUNTIME.note: Runtime agents are not additional constitutional tiers; they are the live processes that host HEXAGON and CODING functions.

sovereign.note: The human is NOT an agent. Sovereign is sovereign. 000-SALAM is the constitutional anchor but never appears in the A2A registry. All agents serve the sovereign. F13 is inviolable.

toolbench.agent_orchestration: up to 8 parallel agents per run; fixed 3-stage FSM: plan → search → build; plan visible+editable before exec

toolbench.mcp_surface: Explicit MCP ingestion: auto-pulls existing Claude configs/skills/MCP servers (low switching cost). Full tool calling + structured JSON output native from model. xAI web search + prompt cache. CLI sandbox: FS/Git/test-runner/shell standard.
